ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio recording */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio file */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number assigned to the recording */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird species */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the audio recording */,
  "recordist" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the recording */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the recording was made */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time the recording was made */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the recording was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the recording site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the recording site in meters */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of audio recording (e.g., song, call) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the recording site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the recording site */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the audio recording (1-5) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Description of the recording equipment used */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of recording */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional observations or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_recordist FOREIGN KEY ("recordist") REFERENCES recordists ("recordist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_common_name FOREIGN KEY ("common_name") REFERENCES species ("common_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_record_type FOREIGN KEY ("record_type") REFERENCES recording_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordists" (
  "recordist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recordist */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the recordist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recordist */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated organization or institution of the recordist */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the recordist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the recordist */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the recordist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recordist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* IUCN conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "biodiversity_index" TEXT /* Index indicating biodiversity richness of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "geographical_features" TEXT /* Notable geographical features of the location */,
  "protected_area" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is a protected area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the recording type (e.g., song, call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recording type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Further classification of the recording type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recording */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the recording was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "activation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
